programme.title: Born to Battle (1935

After discovering the nesters, pretty Betty Powell and her rickety old father, are incapable of rustling, Tom instead turns his attention to the huge, swaggering bully of a foreman, Nate Lenox

programme.title: Raiders of Red Gap
programme.desc: When a gang attacks his ranch and kills one of his ranch hands, Jim Roberts gets together with his neighbors to fight the Bennett Cattle Co., whom they are sure is behind the attacks in a scheme to drive them off their land so they can get it for themselves, then build packing plants so they don't have to spend the money to ship cattle back east

programme.title: Arizona Days (1937) Colorized : Tex Ritter
programme.desc: In Arizona Days, singing cowboy Tex Ritter rides tall in a tale of music, justice, and frontier grit. When a gang of rustlers threatens to bleed the territory dry, Tex takes a job as tax collector and uses his wits, fists, and six-guns to bring law and order. Filled with trail songs, fast-paced action, and Ritter’s easygoing charm, this Western delivers classic entertainment from the saddle.

programme.title: Colorado Sundown (1952)
programme.desc: In Colorado Sundown, Rex Allen stars in a Western adventure of land, greed, and justice on the frontier. When cattlemen and timber interests clash over valuable mountain property, Rex steps in to keep the peace and expose the schemers fueling the feud. With his faithful horse Koko, the comedy of Slim Pickens, and songs that echo across the range, this action-packed tale blends music, mystery, and six-gun justice under the wide Colorado sky.

programme.title: The Trusted Outlaw
programme.desc: Dan Ward, reformed and last member of an outlaw family, meets Molly Clark in a rocky draw near town. Ted Wells, a henchman for Dan's enemy Jim Swain, attempts to shoot Dan but is outdrawn and killed by the latter.

programme.title: Billy the Kid Trapped (1942) Colorized
programme.desc: In Billy the Kid Trapped, Buster Crabbe returns as the notorious outlaw, hunted across the frontier with his pals Fuzzy (Al St. John) and Jeff (Malcolm ‘Bud’ McTaggart). When the trio is framed for crimes they didn’t commit, they must outwit the law, battle ruthless schemers, and fight to clear their names. Packed with fast-paced action, blazing gunfights, and lively camaraderie, this classic Western proves that even a wanted man can ride for justice.

programme.title: Castle Falls
programme.desc: After decades of neglect, Castle Heights Hospital, this symbol of the city's segregated past has been packed with dynamite and is ready to be demolished. No one knows that a gang leader, now in prison, hid the 3 million dollars in cash he stole from his rivals inside the abandoned building. Now, three desperate parties want the money - a blue collared ex-fighter (Adkins) who finds it while working as part of the demolition crew, a prison guard (Lundgren) willing to do anything to pay for his daughter's cancer treatment and a ruthless gang who claim to be the rightful owners. The demolition charges are set, everyone clears out and the Castle is set to fall in 90 minutes. The clock is ticking. Who will find the cash and: will they get out alive?

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: They say you come to New Zealand as a stranger, but leave as family. In this episode of DIRT, the crew goes full circle—meeting Muttonbird chefs Emma and George on the South Island before hopping up to Raglan and working their way back down. Water skiing next to snow-capped mountains, cooking in hot springs the Māori way, and stargazing at Wairarapa Dark Sky Reserve are all on the itinerary. But it’s the final “Feed” done Kiwi-style that makes one thing clear—in this unique and stunning land, nobody’s a stranger for long.

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.desc:
"Here at Huckberry, we believe that style isn’t defined solely by what you wear — it’s personified in your morning rituals, your bookshelves and music library, the furniture you choose to spend your waking hours in, and the gear closet that powers your passions and pursuits. Style doesn’t end with your closet, it sparks to life there.
On Huckberry Homes, we’ll be tapping into the most inspiring members of the Huckberry community to offer an inside peek into how they’ve crafted the place they call home. We will showcase everything from cold plunges to vinyl listening rooms, home gyms and offices, and other tools that inspire creativity and high-performing lives.
For our first entry, we turned to Austin, Texas’ own Scott Ballew. Our good buddy, Scott, is a filmmaker and songwriter who owns a Bohemian bungalow in the heart of Austin’s first suburb. It’s a home now that serves as a creative incubator, gathering place, hideaway, recording studio -- and maybe, as a personal shrine of a man curated by the man himself."

programme.title: Xplash Ep101
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. In this episode we’ll go whitewater kayaking in Canada, BASE Jumping in Idaho, hand-feeding & flipping tiger sharks in the Bahamas, and get a close-up view of the adrenalized new sport of canyoning.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: As the mission gets closer, the 32 must prepare for various scenarios, including CQB - Close Quarters Battle - which can be essential in hostage rescue. Watch the live-fire CQB drill teams and see how they stack up. Plus Don & Randy give the top competitors one last chance to rack up BIG points with another 700 yard Roll-The-Dice Pinnacle Shot. Find out who won... and who lost, in this episode of Surviving Mann.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: It's mission time! The clock is ticking and our hostage's demise is imminent, unless the team can get him out in time. Watch the mission unfold and whether the team succeeds fully in this, the season finale of Surviving Mann. As the mission concludes, see who of the 32 Survived Mann, who came out on top and reminisce with the cast as they say goodbye to the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The CIA has called again, and Don has answered the call on behalf of the A-team. A team of special operatives are needed for a highly classified peace mission that could turn deadly at a moment's notice. To spearhead their mission training efforts, the team hits the range with some state-of-the-art SIRT pistols. Then, the gloves are off and the team gets their first course of fire for the season. After the fun course of fire, the team switches gears to knife throwing and fire building, with the help of Top Knives. It’s safe to say, these All-stars aren’t waiting a second.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: Surviving Mann Season 1 thrilled with action, adventure, and good old-fashioned American determination. But, before Season 2 arrives, Don has a new challenge for the best of the best. In All-Stars the top 3 Surviving Mann contestants face off against 3 elite special ops veterans in a 50-hour no-sleep marathon battle of endurance, skill, and willpower. Do the All-Stars have what it takes to take on these spec ops legends? Find in Surviving Mann: All-Stars.

programme.title: Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2015 - Part 1
programme.desc: The Season XIII WPT Seminole Hard Rock Showdown attracted 1,476 entries, creating a prize pool of $5 million. Bracelet winner Joe Ebanks, WPT finalist Brian Green, and Canadian Ryan Rivers compete against locals Griffin Paul, Andre Crooks, and Shawn Nguyen for the $1 million first-place prize.

programme.title: Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2015 - Part 2
programme.desc: With $1 million up for grabs at the WPT Seminole Hard Rock Showdown final table, local Shawn Nguyen tries to ride the rush after doubling up at the conclusion of the first episode. He competes against bracelet winner Joe Ebanks, WPT finalist Brian Green, Canadian Ryan Rivers, and fellow locals Griffin Paul and Andre Crooks.

programme.title: Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2015 - Part 3
programme.desc: Bracelet winner Joe Ebanks and locals Griffin Paul and Andrew Crooks battle it out at the WPT Seminole Hard Rock Showdown final table. The winner will walk away with $1 million, a Hublot Oceanographic 4000 Watch, and a pair of Monster 24K headphones.

programme.title: WPT World Championship 2015 - Part 1
programme.desc: More than $3.5 million is up for grabs at Borgata Hotel Casino & Spa in the Season XIII WPT World Championship. The WPT’s own Tony Dunst makes a return trip to the final table, and is joined by three-time champion Carlos Mortensen. Ray Qartomy, Brian Yoon, Alex Lakhov, and Asher Conniff also compete for the near $1 million-dollar top prize.

programme.title: Face Up With E-Tay - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: We return to Hollywood, Florida to visit the Seminole Hard Rock Hotel and Casino, plus we showcase the first segment of our in-depth interview with Esther Taylor. Featuring Cate Hall, Jason Mercier, Jennifer Tilly, Stewart Newman, Wendeen Eolis, Esther Taylor, and Tim Reilly.

programme.title: Woe Is Stapes - Poker Night In America

programme.title: S1E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, and Nicholi Rogatkin, freestyle powerhouse, tackle the Downhill Challenge Medellín, the longest urban downhill race, with #HyperSmooth. Then join Gee, Rachel, and Dan Atherton, enduro and downhill champions, as they ride together through heart-pounding terrain. Speed, skill, and adrenaline collide in every unforgettable moment.

programme.title: S2E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch Sam Reynolds, street shredder, Clemens Kaudela, slopestyle champion, Theo Erlangsen, trail innovator, and Vincent Tupin, downhill powerhouse, in an exhilarating GoPro Course Preview in South Africa. Then head to Zion, Utah for Red Bull Rampage with Jaxson Riddle, big-air phenom, Reed Boggs, freeride master, Thomas Genon, slopestyle superstar, and Tom Van Steenbergen, trail blazing pro, as they push the limits of skill and courage on some of the planet’s most extreme terrain.

programme.title: S2E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic rides around the world. Watch Olympic gold medalist Conor Fields, BMX champion, compete at the highest level, then join GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, Geoff Gulevich, trail expert, and Sam Reynolds, street shredder, as they explore the stunning landscapes and dramatic terrain of Cappadocia, Turkey. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every breathtaking moment.

programme.title: S1E1 Skate
programme.desc: This episode features the inspiring story of founders Miguel and Isabel. Driven by the belief that kids should be free to just be kids, #GoProForACause partner SanSkate is making a real difference in their community. Their mission is to provide a safe space for children who enter the workforce at a young age, giving them a chance to set aside their struggles and enjoy skateboarding. The episode also showcases the very best of GoPro skateboarding, featuring incredible talent from Andrew Brophy, Sewa Kroetkov, Madars Apse, and more.

programme.title: S1E2 Skate
programme.desc: Watch the inspiring story of Mike Rogers, an all-around skateboarding star from Cocoa Beach, FL. A regular competitor at top events around the world, including the Vans Pro-Tec Pool Party, Vans Bowl-A-Rama at Bondi Beach, and the Clash at Clairemont, Mike showcases his skill, style, and dedication to the sport. The episode also features Leticia Bufoni and Cata Diaz as she shares her perspective on women in skateboarding and explains why MACBA in Barcelona has become a world-renowned destination for skaters, with its iconic plaza, unique architecture, and perfectly smooth concrete.
